programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.desc: A woman wakes up from a coma with no memory of her previous life. She soon uncovers some unpleasant truth about the woman she once was and must fight for redemption. Starring Anna Lise Phillips (2016)

programme.title: The Other Mother

programme.title: A Woman Deceived

programme.desc: Short legs, big heart that's Jock who grows up in South Africa with his loyal friend Percy

programme.title: Freedom Force (aka The Illusionauts)
programme.desc: Unlikely events shake France. All of the heroes from the books of famous author Jules Verne were brought to life and, without knowing it, began to cause chaos and destruction. But when the new French President, and the Minister of Culture conceive to re-release a novel by the great writer, they accidently corrupt everything within, using a device called "The Imaginasium". Only a team of four talented children can save France now, as they're sent into the stories in order to return all of them back on track and put the heroes of Jules Verne's novels back to the pages from whence they came.

programme.title: Father of Invention
programme.desc: Father of Invention

programme.title: Beyond the Brick: A Lego Brickumentary
programme.desc: This playful documentary explores how LEGO bricks went from kids' toys to a global phenomenon beloved by all.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: A young girl finds herself in a reform school after therapy since she was blamed for the death of a young boy.

programme.title: James Cameron's Deepsea Challenge
programme.desc: Filmmaker James Cameron ventures to the bottom of the sea, capturing never-before-seen vistas and creatures.

programme.title: Welcome to Valentine
programme.desc: Newly single and unemployed Olivia returns to her Nebraska hometown where she meets George. Starring Kathryn Davis (2023)

programme.title: Love's Match
programme.desc: The owner of a dating site finds herself falling for a professional matchmaker. Starring Megan Hutchings (2021)

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton is an ambitious podcast producer under pressure to deliver a hit show. Will a show centred around finding her one true love prove to be a success? Starring Stephanie Bennett. (2021)

programme.title: Scents and Sensibility
programme.desc: In this modern adaptation of Jane Austen's Sense and Sensibility, Elinor and Marianne find themselves penniless after their father's fortune is taken away. As they look for ways to pay the bills, they encounter people who judge them and try to keep them down in the dumps. Add falling in love into the mix, and determining whom to trust becomes a mine field. Can the sisters find a balance between relying on their hearts and using good sense without losing everything they hold dear?

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Austentatious
programme.desc: Lizzie gets excited when she lands a new real estate client, but it ends up being Collin, who isn't as subtle with his interest as he thinks. Elinor unexpectedly gets a promotion, but before she can celebrate, she learns that the promotion makes her the one to deal with the IRS when her employer's company comes under investigation. The IRS agent she deals with is Edward Ferrars, and a pleasant surprise from the typical IRS agent she expected. Emma and her coworker Mr. Darcy have to work on a case together. Emma finds her legal methods are different from Darcy's, and frustration ensues until both can stop to understand the other's perspective.

programme.title: A Nashville Wish
programme.desc: A young country singer dreams of making it big in Nashville and begins dating a popular cheerleader, but she doesn't share his love of music. When his career takes off, he must choose between love and following your destiny no matter what.

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise
programme.desc: Ellie tends to the injured and cantankerous Jordan as he heals from a shoulder injury. Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: Requiem for a Gringo
programme.desc: A unique Euro-western with the hero as an astrologist who wears a leopard suit.

programme.title: Three Ruthless Ones
programme.desc: The Walker brothers - one a criminal, another a U.S. Marshal, and the third a wealthy rancher - share a lifelong goal: to avenge their father's murder, witnessed as children. When they finally track down the killer, their clashing ideals lead to a dramatic and inevitable showdown, testing family bonds and justice itself.

programme.title: Seven Guns for the MacGregors
programme.desc: Ranch owner MacGregor has seven sons and oldest Gregor leads his brothers to Las Mesas, a small town where they want to sell horses. They get into trouble with local people who are related with evil Santillana. After getting imprisoned and losing their horses they decide to go after Santillana's gang.

programme.title: The Executioner of God
programme.desc: A former gunman turned priest seeks vengeance on three bandits who are masquerading as law-abiding citizens.

programme.title: Ride the Man Down
programme.desc: Disputes over a dead man's property escalate into a bloody range war.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness something incredible.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Kavinga Safari Camp Part 1
programme.desc: Kristina's guide, Andy, treats her to wonderful riverbed drives and wild encounters on foot. They happen upon a magnificent leopard with her impala kill up a tree and an eventful night drive leads them into a potential battle as a coalition of 3 foreign male lions step into the resident king's territory!

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is a ribbon of land trapped by natural borders. At its Northern edge, the driest desert in the world cuts off the country from the rest of South America. Here, in the Atacama desert, wildlife has spent millions of years adapting to a life without water. Those that survive have learnt that no opportunity comes without its fair share of risk, but for the animals of the Atacama, only those that dare, will make it in the most unforgiving desert on Earth.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness something incredible.

programme.title: Wolves
programme.desc: Wolves: icons of the wilderness, spectacular creatures that live and die by the sword.

programme.title: Uncharted Amazon
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Peru, a silky anteater is fighting to stay awake and a mother humming bird is struggling to raise her chick. The seasonal downpours are about to begin and the rainforest's animals must strive to cope with the changing conditions. Through millions of years of evolution they have developed bizarre relationships and unexpected strategies to overcome them, but for all their ingenuity, they were never prepared for the arrival of a new species on the scene.

programme.title: Hidden Australia
programme.desc: Sometimes called the biggest island on Earth, Australia is a sub-continent of incredible diversity, beauty, danger and downright weirdness. The 4,000km between the coasts are made up of a patchwork of contrasting landscapes: tropical rainforests, snow-capped mountains, dry woodland, giant wetlands, tropical reefs and hostile desert. These vast tracts of wilderness boast the world's most unique and bizarre wildlife communities. In this ‘hidden' Australia, there is an astonishing surprise at every turn.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Spirits, Kings, Lemurs – Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied her on her trip. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe - in search of images that will capture the soul of this small and beautiful country. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Cape Verde – the islands of Saudade, of longing. For Stéphane and Richard it was a journey full of adventure, unforgettable encounters and magnificent photographs. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied them on their trip. (S1 E05)

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: This foray through northern realms of our planet above the polar circle takes us to a part of our world especially affected by climate change. The often-cited adaptability of animals could also enable them to survive under new conditions. The camera team made this foray through the polar region, from Canada to Norway, to document that, which in the opinion of many nature researchers, will no longer be visible in 30 to 50 years' time. Following the observation of ice bear mother with her young in Canada's Wapusk National Park at Hudson Bay, is a herd of harp seals on the ice during the breeding season. The Arctic Ocean ringed seals in Hudson Bay, on the other hand, prefer solitude. Should the offspring be born in an extremely cold night, they often freeze to death. Their bodies sink to the seabed at the beginning of spring when the pack ice thaws. Scavengers like the rare Greenland shark, who sees them as a welcome snack, quickly eats them. Underwater footage of this process also attempted by our camera team, very rarely succeeds.

programme.title: The Last Paradises
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: The Moor
programme.desc: Moors and peatlands are oases in the cultivated landscape of Central Europe.

programme.title: Treasure of Lima
programme.desc: This is a story about a remote island in the pacific.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Blippi The Musical
programme.desc: Blippi The Musical brings the lively Blippi from the screen to the stage in an exciting live show. Recorded in Nashville, TN, the performance features 14 songs, including favorites like "Do the Blippi Dance," "Brush Brush Your Teeth," and "Monster Truck." Your Blippi fan will enjoy learning about the world while singing and dancing along with this special show. There's so much to explore—it'll make you want to sing and shout!

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: The Berry Bitty Dance Disaster
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some “groove booties” programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Doggie Dance No-Show
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Foods that Grow
programme.desc: Ready Set Grow! With a garden's worth of greenery, Avery grills up a batch of veggie burgers. Lily heads into the field to unravel a mystery: how do greenhouses help veggies grow in winter (Psst. The secret is right under your feet). Then our duo discovers a funny thing about tomatoes – they're actually fruit! And avocados are actually berries! Turn them into dip and discover a delicious treat.

programme.title: Foods that Stick

But, when the octopus sushi gives him the willies, will he be able to stick to the task? Our hosts really bond when they compete to see who can make the stickiest snacks. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.
